message:
feat(robot-idempotency): add mutation deduplication guard for safe retries (ft-3681t.4.6)

Implements at-least-once safe mutation semantics for robot API actions.
MutationKey (content-addressed FNV-1a, consistent with tx_idempotency),
MutationGuard with TTL eviction and FIFO capacity bounds, MutationOutcome
discriminating first-execution from deduplicated replay. Includes key
helpers for send_text, split_pane, close_pane, event_annotate, workflow_run,
and agent_configure. 35+ unit tests covering determinism, dedup, eviction,
TTL expiry, failure caching, batch checks, and telemetry.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
